title: When Consuming (e
subtitle: Rethink Default Quantities
description:
When consuming (e.g., food, resources):
- Ask yourself: "Do I really need this much, or am I just following the default?"
- Adjust portions: Take only what’s appropriate for your needs, not the suggested amount.
- Set your own limits: Avoid letting external standards dictate your consumption.

Example: Served a large plate of food? Eat until you’re satisfied, not until the plate is empty.

lifeOsSource.checkIn: Check in when you adjust consumption based on your actual needs.

faq.question: How do I track my progress with this habit?
faq.answer: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.
faq.answerHtml: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.

faq.question: What if I miss a day or forget to do this habit?
faq.answer: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.
faq.answerHtml: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.

faq.question: How long does it take to form this habit?
faq.answer: Research shows habits can take 21-66 days to form. Focus on consistency rather than perfection, and use the app to build momentum.

howTo.title: Define the metric baseline
howTo.summary: Identify a specific metric to track your consumption, such as grams consumed or number of seconds paused before serving. This will help you measure progress and make adjustments.

howTo.title: Choose your context
howTo.summary: Select a specific situation to practice your portion control, like dinner plates, office snacks, or digital downloads. Focus on one context to simplify your initial efforts.

howTo.title: Implement the pause ritual
howTo.summary: Before serving or consuming, take a 3-10 second pause to evaluate your needs. Ask yourself if you really need the portion being offered or if you are just following defaults.

howTo.title: Set your portion limits
howTo.summary: Decide on a concrete portion size based on your needs and commit to it. Use smaller plates or containers to help visualize and control your intake.

howTo.title: Check in with LifeOS Brali app
howTo.summary: Log your results in the Brali LifeOS app to track your progress and reflect on your consumption habits. Visit https://metalhatscats.com/life-os/question-default-portions/.
